memberdef.definition: typedef void(* modem_chat_match_callback) (struct modem_chat *chat, char **argv, uint16_t argc, void *user_data)
memberdef.name: modem_chat_match_callback

briefdescription.para: Callback called when matching chat is received.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to array of parsed arguments
Number of parsed arguments, arg 0 holds the exact match
Free to use user data set during modem_chat_init()

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* modem_chat_script_callback) (struct modem_chat *chat, enum modem_chat_script_result result, void *user_data)
memberdef.name: modem_chat_script_callback

briefdescription.para: Callback called when script chat is received.

parameterdescription.para: Free to use user data set during modem_chat_init()
Configuration which shall be applied to Chat instance

simplesect.para: Chat instance must be attached to pipe

briefdescription.para: Attach modem chat instance to pipe.

parameterdescription.para: Pipe instance to attach Chat instance to

simplesect.para: 0 if successful
negative errno code if failure
Chat instance is enabled if successful

briefdescription.para: Check if a script is running.

simplesect.para: true if a script is currently running
false if a script is not currently running
0 if script successfully started
-EBUSY if a script is currently running
-EPERM if modem pipe is not attached
-EINVAL if arguments or script is invalid
Script runs asynchronously until complete or aborted.
0 if successful
-EBUSY if a script is currently running
-EPERM if modem pipe is not attached
-EINVAL if arguments or script is invalid
Script runs until complete or aborted.
Function exists for backwards compatibility and should be deprecated
0 if script successfully started
-EBUSY if a script is currently running
-EPERM if modem pipe is not attached
-EINVAL if arguments or script is invalid

briefdescription.para: Set match of modem chat match instance.

simplesect.para: The lifetime of match must match or exceed the lifetime of chat_match
Always call this API after match is modified

parameterdescription.para: if successful, negative errno code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Set separators of modem chat match instance.

simplesect.para: The lifetime of separators must match or exceed the lifetime of chat_match
Always call this API after separators are modified

parameterdescription.para: if successful, negative errno code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Set modem chat match partial flag.
Set modem chat match wildcards flag.
Set request of modem chat script chat instance.

simplesect.para: The lifetime of request must match or exceed the lifetime of script_chat
Always call this API after request is modified

parameterdescription.para: if successful, negative errno code otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (struct modem_chat_script_chat *script_chat, const struct modem_chat_match *response_matches, uint16_t response_matches_size)
memberdef.name: modem_chat_script_chat_set_response_matches

briefdescription.para: Set modem chat script chat matches.

simplesect.para: The lifetime of response_matches must match or exceed the lifetime of script_chat

parameterdescription.para: if successful, negative errno code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Set modem chat script chat timeout.

simplesect.para: The lifetime of name must match or exceed the lifetime of script

memberdef.argsstring: (struct modem_chat_script *script, const struct modem_chat_script_chat *script_chats, uint16_t script_chats_size)
memberdef.name: modem_chat_script_set_script_chats

simplesect.para: The lifetime of script_chats must match or exceed the lifetime of script

parameterdescription.para: if successful, negative errno code otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (struct modem_chat_script *script, const struct modem_chat_match *abort_matches, uint16_t abort_matches_size)
memberdef.name: modem_chat_script_set_abort_matches

briefdescription.para: Set modem chat script abort matches.

simplesect.para: The lifetime of abort_matches must match or exceed the lifetime of script

parameterdescription.para: if successful, negative errno code otherwise

memberdef.name: MODEM_CHAT_SCRIPT_DEFINE
memberdef.initializer: const static struct modem_chat_script _sym = { \ .name = #_sym, \ .script_chats = _script_chats, \ .script_chats_size = ARRAY_SIZE(_script_chats), \ .abort_matches = _abort_matches, \ .abort_matches_size = ARRAY_SIZE(_abort_matches), \ .callback = _callback, \ .timeout = _timeout_s, \ }
